generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor that converts electrical current (I_M) into mechanical torque (τ_M)"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "A multi-stage gearbox system comprising a standard gearbox followed by a cycloidal gearbox that reduces torque (τ_G → τ_out) while adjusting rotational speed. The cycloidal gearbox ensures low backlash and positional uncertainty reduction via dual encoder feedback (motor encoder + secondary encoder)."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Positional encoder directly mounted on the motor to measure angular position and provide feedback for torque/velocity control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox to measure angular position and reduce backlash/elasticity-induced errors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring electrical current (I_M) via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to derive torque (τ_M) using motor-specific constants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction - Data transmission
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data - Engineering Models
instance MotorGearboxBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the first axis as a composite of motor, gearbox, and cycloidal gearbox with rotational (torque/velocity) and electrical (current) flows"
]

instance MotorGearboxIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram specifying component interconnections (e.g., torque transmission paths) for the first axis components (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gearbox)"
]

// C10: Models/Data - Simulation Models
instance FrictionlessSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model representing frictionless system behavior (Fig. 4a)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Coulomb-Viscous friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Stribeck friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Dahl friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating LuGre friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C10: Models/Data - Data Traces
instance MeasuredMotorCurrentTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series of motor current (I_M) from current sensors with source origin (SINUMERIK 840D controller) and timestamps"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngleTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series of motor angle measurements from encoders with source origin (motor encoder) and timestamps"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series of motor torque (τ_M) derived from current measurements with source origin (motor current sensor) and timestamps"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series of angular velocity (ω) from encoders with source origin (secondary encoder) and timestamps"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedFrictionlessOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Outputs from frictionless Simulink model (θr_M, θr_G, θr_out) representing ideal system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SimulatedFrictionOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Outputs from friction-influenced Simulink models (θr_M, θr_G, θr_out) representing actual system behavior with friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance FrictionMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata for each data trace including source origin (sensor channel, simulation model) and time-stamps for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to Digital Shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelBasedControlOptimization
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and continuous model refinement"
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool (SysML) for structural/behavioral modeling of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified interface for real-time visualization of live data and simulation outputs in friction analysis dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework for linking digital and physical components (robot axes) with contextual metadata (AAS compliance)"
    DTDFVocab:enables MultiPhysicsAwareness
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction loss (static, kinetic, viscous) in gearbox via unified dashboard integrating live data and simulation outputs"
]

instance ModelBasedControlOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification and refinement of friction models (white-box/black-box) to improve robot motion accuracy by adjusting control parameters dynamically"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsAwareness : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of friction-induced deviations between measured and simulated system behavior (torque/velocity discrepancies) using AAS-compliant data structures"
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of static/kinetic/viscous friction losses via model-data discrepancies"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalParameterUpdate
]

instance ControlOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction models to minimize motion inaccuracies (up to 30% reduction achievable)"
]

instance OperationalParameterUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter updates (gearbox settings, motor current limits) based on live friction estimates"
]

// Relationships
MotorCurrentSensor DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
MotorEncoder DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
SecondaryEncoder DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
MotorCurrentSensor DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueData

MotorCurrentData DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentTrace
MotorAngleData DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorAngleTrace
TorqueData DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueTrace
AngularVelocityData DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredAngularVelocityTrace

MotorGearboxBDD DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
MotorGearboxIBD DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
FrictionlessSimulation DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
CoulombViscousSimulation DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
StribeckSimulation DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
DahlSimulation DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
LuGreSimulation DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
MeasuredMotorCurrentTrace DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
MeasuredMotorAngleTrace DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
MeasuredTorqueTrace DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
MeasuredAngularVelocityTrace DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
SimulatedFrictionlessOutput DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
SimulatedFrictionOutput DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
FrictionMetadata DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell

MQTTProtocol DTDFVocab:enables ModelBasedControlOptimization
SysMLTool DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisDashboard
DashboardVisualization DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisDashboard
AssetAdministrationShell DTDFVocab:enables MultiPhysicsAwareness

FrictionAnalysisDashboard DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
ModelBasedControlOptimization DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationInsight

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on a **real-time, event-driven time scale**:
  - **Data Sampling Rate**: Sensor data (I_M, torque, angular velocity) is streamed at **high frequency** (not explicitly quantified but implied to be continuous or near-real-time via MQTT).
  - **Model Update Frequency**: Friction models are dynamically updated during operation to account for wear, load variations, or environmental changes (e.g., temperature effects).
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are time-stamped and linked to the physical system’s operational timeline for traceability."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation consists of:
  1. **Centralized Digital Shadow**: A **concrete realization** of the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) incorporating:
     - **Purpose**: Understanding friction loss in the robot’s first axis to improve motion accuracy.
     - **Asset**: The first axis (motor + gearbox + cycloidal gearbox).
     - **Data Traces**: Measured (I_M, torque, velocity) and simulated (frictionless/friction-influenced) outputs.
     - **Processing Components**: Simulation models (MATLAB Simulink) and traceability links via metadata.
  2. **Interconnected Components**: The Digital Shadow serves as a foundational baseline for a broader **Digital Twin** of the robotic system, enabling multi-physics awareness and continuous friction model updates."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin spans the following lifecycle stages:
  1. **As Designed**: Defined via **SysML models** (BDDs/IBDs) during the **development phase** to describe structural and behavioral components (motor, gearbox).
  2. **As Operated**: Enables **real-time friction monitoring** and **control optimization** during robot operation, focusing on **continuous model calibration** for improved motion accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Sensor-Based Validation**: Two-positional encoders reduce backlash/positional uncertainty, enabling accurate friction modeling.
  2. **Data Trace Comparison**: Deviations between **simulated vs. measured data** (e.g., ˆ_r_out vs. r_out) quantify friction effects and validate model accuracy.
  3. **Traceability**: Semantic linking via **AAS** and **origin associations** ensures reproducibility of data generation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections are established via:
  1. **MQTT Protocol**: Real-time data streaming from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to the Digital Shadow.
  2. **SysML Models**: Structured communication between physical components (robot axes) and digital models (BDD/IBD).
  3. **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Enables semantic linking of digital and physical assets (e.g., robot axes) with contextual metadata."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates with:
  1. **External Sensors**: Additional data from the robot’s safety cell (e.g., working range restrictions [-90° to 90°]).
  2. **CNC Controller**: Siemens SINUMERIK 840D for real-time control commands (position/speed/acceleration inputs/outputs)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to:
  1. **SysML (System Modeling Language)**: For structural/behavioral modeling.
  2. **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: For data traceability and metadata standards.
  3. **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: For semantic interoperability between digital and physical assets."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed via:
  1. **Safety Cell Constraints**: Physical limits (±90°) restrict operational range to prevent collisions.
  2. **Data Transmission**: MQTT protocol ensures real-time data integrity (though encryption is not explicitly mentioned). No explicit mention of remote operation or cybersecurity protocols (e.g., TLS) for data transmission."
]
